TypeSignature.Value: public interface IConfigurationEventHandlerContextAware<T> : Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.IConfigurationEventHandler<T> where T : class

.class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit IConfigurationEventHandlerContextAware`1<class T> implements class Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.IConfigurationEventHandler`1<!T>
Public Interface IConfigurationEventHandlerContextAware(Of T) Implements IConfigurationEventHandler(Of T)
type IConfigurationEventHandlerContextAware<'T (requires 'T : null)> = interface interface IConfigurationEventHandler<'T (requires 'T : null)>

Docs.summary: Defines event handlers for configuration retrieval and update operations.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task AfterUpdateAsync (string metadataAddress, T configuration, Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.ConfigurationRetrievalContext context, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task AfterUpdateAsync(string metadataAddress, !T configuration, class Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.ConfigurationRetrievalContext context, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed
Public Function AfterUpdateAsync (metadataAddress As String, configuration As T, context As ConfigurationRetrievalContext, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task
abstract member AfterUpdateAsync : string * 'T * Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.ConfigurationRetrievalContext * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task

Docs.param: The context for the configuration retrieval operation, providing additional information and control.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
Docs.summary: Called in a fire-and-forget manner after a configuration has been successfully retrieved.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.ConfigurationEventHandlerResult<T>> BeforeRetrieveAsync (string metadataAddress, Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.ConfigurationRetrievalContext context, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.ConfigurationEventHandlerResult`1<!T>> BeforeRetrieveAsync(string metadataAddress, class Microsoft.IdentityModel.Protocols.Configuration.ConfigurationRetrievalContext context, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Function BeforeRetrieveAsync (metadataAddress As String, context As ConfigurationRetrievalContext, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of ConfigurationEventHandlerResult(Of T))

Docs.param: The context for the configuration retrieval operation, providing additional information and control.
A cancellation token to observe while waiting for the task to complete.
Docs.summary: Called before retrieving configuration from the metadata endpoint.
Docs.returns: A if valid and available, or to proceed with normal retrieval.
